baseline.description: Mixed storefront browse/review/cart/checkout journey with run cleanup

stress-storefront.description: Read-only storefront browsing, category, search, and detail pressure

stress-cart.description: Cart add/update/remove/clear lifecycle with tagged sessions

stress-reviews.description: Review create/read/aggregate/delete lifecycle with tagged reviewers

stress-orders.description: Checkout, order history, and status updates with run cleanup

stress-products.description: Admin-style product CRUD with tagged catalog artifacts

stress-ui.description: Page-rendering flow from browse to checkout with tagged UI sessions

spike.description: Burst read-only spike against catalog, detail, reviews, and UI pages
